description_long: This object is a computer motherboard, featuring a rectangular printed circuit board populated with various electronic components. It has multiple slots for RAM modules, a large CPU socket with a yellow retention bracket, and several PCI or PCIe expansion slots. The board is populated with capacitors, connectors, and heat sinks, most notably a prominent yellow heat sink near the center. Along one edge, there are multiple I/O ports for external connections, including USB, audio, and network interfaces. The surface is densely packed with traces and soldered components, giving it a complex and technical appearance. The overall color scheme is a mix of gray, black, and yellow, with metallic highlights from connectors and heat sinks.
description: A rectangular computer motherboard with yellow heat sinks, multiple slots, and dense electronic components. It features a prominent CPU socket and various I/O ports along one edge.
description_view_0: The motherboard is seen at an angle, highlighting the yellow CPU socket and heat sink, with RAM and expansion slots visible.
description_view_1: A side profile showing the low height of the board and the alignment of components, with the yellow heat sinks standing out.
description_view_2: An angled top-down view emphasizing the arrangement of slots and the central yellow heat sink.
description_view_3: A direct top-down view displaying the full layout of the motherboard, including the CPU socket, RAM slots, and I/O ports.
